---
title: Shell
---

::: {.callout-tip}
Click the `</>` button in the top navigation bar to view the original `.qmd` source code.
:::

*Calepin* runs shell chunks in a persistent `/bin/sh` subprocess. Shell state --- variables, working directory, and environment --- persists across chunks.

# Basic usage

```{sh}
echo "Hello from the shell"
uname -s
```

# Persistent state

Variables set in one chunk carry over to the next:

```{sh}
GREETING="Hello, world"
```

```{sh}
echo "$GREETING"
```

# Inline expressions

The current user is `{sh} whoami`.

# Piping and commands

Standard shell constructs work as expected:

```{sh}
seq 1 5 | paste -sd+ | bc
```
